spec.objective: Add examples/projects/hetero/project.yaml (reference Claude-planner plus Codex-executor Project using subagent.levels.task.vendor openai, subagent.levels.task.image ghcr.io/jsquirrelz/tide-codex-subagent, and codexProviderSecretRef). Update examples/projects/dogfood/02-codex-runtime-project.yaml to consume the new codexProviderSecretRef and per-level vendor fields. Add test/integration/kind/hetero_dispatch_test.go exercising mixed-provider waves: all real OpenAI API calls are guarded by OPENAI_API_KEY env set and testing.Short(); test reproduces D4 failure semantics (forced Codex task failure causes sibling to continue, dependents to never dispatch, non-dependents to dispatch in strict profile); asserts tide_cost_cents_total and cache-efficiency panel carry non-zero Codex spend under locked label set with task label absent. make test exits 0; metriccardinality analyzer green.
